9.reason: Loop condition should be i < len, otherwise it prints the null terminator.

13.reason: Missing validation: does not check if characters around '-' are of the same type and in correct order, and does not handle cases where expansion should not occur (e.g., a-R, D-e, 0-b, 4-B). Also, when i is 0, line[i-1] accesses out-of-bounds memory.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing validation: does not check if characters around '-' are of the same type and in correct order, and does not handle cases where expansion should not occur (e.g., a-R, D-e, 0-b, 4-B). Also, when i is 0, line[i-1] accesses out-of-bounds memory.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Missing checks for character type consistency and ordering; also missing handling for cases where expansion should not occur (e.g., different types or invalid ranges).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing checks: should only expand if both characters are same type (lowercase, uppercase, or digit) and left < right. Also need boundary checks for i-1 and i+1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Expands unconditionally without checking validity; also fails to output '-' when expansion conditions are not met.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing validation: expansion should only occur if line[i-1] and line[i+1] are of the same type (both lowercase, uppercase, or digits) and line[i-1] < line[i+1]. Otherwise, '-' should be printed.

11.reason: Missing validation to ensure both surrounding characters are of the same type and the left character is strictly less than the right character.
